description_long: This object is a small, elongated doll with a simple, abstract form, likely hand-carved from a single piece of wood. The body is cylindrical and tapers slightly at both ends, with a rounded head that is only subtly distinguished from the torso by a shallow groove. The surface is matte and shows visible grain and irregularities, suggesting a natural wood material. There are no visible limbs, facial features, or clothing details, giving the doll a primitive, minimalist appearance. The coloration is a uniform light tan to brown, with some darker patches and marks that add to its rustic character.
description: A small, hand-carved wooden doll with a simple, elongated body and rounded head, featuring a natural tan-brown finish and no visible limbs or facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the doll, with the rounded head and cylindrical body clearly visible, and a shallow groove separating the head from the torso.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the flatness of the form and the subtle tapering at both ends, with the head and body appearing as a continuous piece.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, showing the same elongated shape and rounded head, with natural wood grain and some darker marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the same features as the first side, with visible surface texture and a slightly uneven profile.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll is unadorned and appears to be a single carved piece without garments or textile patterns.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with a straight torso and head aligned vertically; no arms or legs are present or articulated.
attribute_facial_expression: No facial features or expression are present; the head is smooth and featureless.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is visible; the head is smooth and unadorned.
